name: Pumpkin Dump Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first 8 ingredients together in a large bowl until well combined.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased 13x9 inch pan.
3. Sprinkle the cake mix evenly over the pumpkin mixture.
4. Sprinkle chopped pecans over the cake mix, then pour the melted margarine evenly over the top.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour (or more), depending on your oven. Keep an eye on the time as ovens can vary slightly.
6. Serve with Cool Whip on top.
Milnot is a brand name for evaporated milk (unsweetened)
